# Remediation Tier Report

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by tools/generate_rule_catalog.py — do not edit by hand -->

Analysis of default remediation routing for all rules. Regenerate with:
`python tools/generate_rule_catalog.py`

## Summary

| Tier | Count | % of 156 |
|------|-------|--------|
| Tier 1 — auto (has transform) | 25 | 16% |
| Tier 2 — AI (task/block, no fixer) | 69 | 44% |
| Tier 3 — manual | 62 | 39% |

### Promotion potential

- **27** Tier 2 rules could likely move to Tier 1 (mechanical transforms)
- **8** Tier 3 rules have mechanical fixes blocked by scope
- **69 - 27 = 42** Tier 2 rules should stay AI (judgment/security)

| info severity | 19 |
| playbook scope | 16 |
| collection scope | 11 |

| play scope | 9 |

## Tier 1 — Auto (25 rules)

| Rule ID | Validator | Severity | Scope | Description |
|---------|-----------|----------|-------|-------------|
| L005 | OPA | low | task | Community collection module detected; use certified or validated collections. |
| L007 | OPA | low | task | Prefer command when no shell features needed. |
| L008 | OPA | low | task | Use delegate_to: localhost instead of local_action. |
| L009 | OPA | medium | task | Avoid comparison to empty string in when. |
| L010 | OPA | medium | task | Use failed_when or register instead of ignore_errors. |
| L011 | OPA | low | task | Avoid literal true/false in when. |
| L012 | OPA | low | task | Avoid state=latest; pin package versions. |
| L013 | OPA | medium | task | command/shell/raw need changed_when or creates/removes. |
| L015 | OPA | low | task | Avoid Jinja in when; use variables. |
| L018 | OPA | high | play | become_user should have corresponding become. |
| L020 | OPA | high | task | mode should be string with leading zero. |
| L021 | OPA | low | task | Set mode explicitly for file/copy/template. |
| L022 | OPA | low | task | Shell with pipe should set set -o pipefail. |
| L025 | OPA | low | task | Task/play name should start with uppercase. |
| L026 | Native | low | task | Tasks should use FQCN for modules. |
| L043 | Native | low | task | Bare variable in with_* loop directive; use {{ var }}. |
| L046 | Native | low | task | Avoid raw/command/shell without args key. |
| L084 | Native | low | task | Task names in included sub-task files should use a prefix. |
| M001 | Ansible | high | task | FQCN resolution — module resolved to a different canonical name. |
| M002 | Ansible | high | task | Deprecated module — module has deprecation metadata. |
| M003 | Ansible | high | task | Module redirect — module name was redirected to a new FQCN. |
| M004 | Ansible | error | task | Removed module — tombstoned module that raises AnsiblePluginRemovedError. |
| M006 | OPA | high | task | become with ignore_errors will not catch timeout in 2.19+. |
| M008 | OPA | high | task | Bare include is removed in 2.19+; use include_tasks or import_tasks. |
| M009 | OPA | high | task | with_* loops are deprecated; use loop instead. |
